apps.name: Portainer CE
apps.description: Web UI for managing Docker: containers, images, volumes, networks.
apps.why: If you ever want to look 'under the hood' of your server, Portainer shows every container in a friendly web interface — start, stop and inspect things without typing commands. Helmsman already covers the basics, so this is for power users.
apps.compose:
services:
  portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:9000"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - portainer_data:/data
volumes:
  portainer_data:

apps.name: Uptime Kuma
apps.tagline: Know immediately when something is down
apps.description: Beautiful self-hosted uptime monitoring with notifications.
apps.why: Kuma pings your websites and services around the clock and sends you a message (Telegram, mail, …) the moment something stops responding — so you find out before your friends or family do.
apps.compose:
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:1
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3001"
    volumes:
      - kuma_data:/app/data
volumes:
  kuma_data:

apps.name: Grafana
apps.description: Dashboards and visualization for metrics and logs.
apps.why: Grafana turns numbers (CPU, temperatures, visitors, power usage …) into beautiful live dashboards. It needs a data source like Prometheus to be really useful — an advanced but very popular tool.
apps.compose:
services:
  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
volumes:
  grafana_data:

apps.name: Vaultwarden
apps.description: Lightweight Bitwarden-compatible password manager server.
apps.why: Store all your passwords on YOUR server instead of someone else's cloud. Works with the official Bitwarden apps on phone and browser — install those, point them at your server, done.
apps.compose:
services:
  vaultwarden:
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - vw_data:/data
volumes:
  vw_data:

apps.name: AdGuard Home
apps.tagline: Block ads on every device at home
apps.description: Network-wide ad & tracker blocking DNS server.
apps.why: Set your router's DNS to this server and ads + trackers disappear on every phone, TV and laptop in your home — no app needed on the devices themselves.
apps.compose:
services:
  adguard:
    image: adguard/adguardhome:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "53:53/udp"
      - "53:53/tcp"
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    volumes:
      - adguard_work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - adguard_conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
volumes:
  adguard_work:
  adguard_conf:

apps.name: Jellyfin
apps.description: Free media server for movies, shows and music.
apps.why: Put your movies and series on the server and stream them to any TV, phone or laptop with the free Jellyfin apps — like Netflix, but it's your library and no subscription.
apps.compose:
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8096"
    volumes:
      - jf_config:/config
      - jf_cache:/cache
      - {{MEDIA}}:/media:ro
volumes:
  jf_config:
  jf_cache:

apps.name: Navidrome
apps.description: Modern music server, compatible with Subsonic apps (Amperfy, Substreamer …).
apps.why: Stream your own MP3/FLAC collection to your phone like Spotify — with playlists, covers and offline apps. Your music, no monthly fee.
apps.compose:
services:
  navidrome:
    image: deluan/navidrome:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:4533"
    volumes:
      - nd_data:/data
      - {{MUSIC}}:/music:ro
volumes:
  nd_data:

apps.name: Nextcloud
apps.description: Self-hosted files, calendar, contacts and more.
apps.why: Photos, files, calendar and contacts synced across all your devices — like Google Drive/iCloud, but the data stays on your server. The official apps handle automatic photo backup from your phone.
apps.compose:
services:
  db:
    image: mariadb:11
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc-root
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc
    volumes:
      - nc_db:/var/lib/mysql
  app:
    image: nextcloud:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    environment:
      MYSQL_HOST: db
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc
    volumes:
      - nc_data:/var/www/html
    depends_on:
      - db
volumes:
  nc_db:
  nc_data:

apps.name: Gitea
apps.description: Lightweight self-hosted Git service (like GitHub).
apps.why: Host your code repositories privately on your own server, with a familiar GitHub-style web interface. Mostly interesting if you write code.
apps.compose:
services:
  gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
      - "{{SSH_PORT}}:22"
    volumes:
      - gitea_data:/data
volumes:
  gitea_data:

apps.name: code-server
apps.description: VS Code in the browser, running on your server.
apps.why: A full programming editor that runs on the server and opens in any browser — edit projects from your iPad or a borrowed laptop. For developers.
apps.compose:
services:
  code-server:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/code-server:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - PASSWORD={{PASSWORD}}
      - TZ=Europe/Berlin
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8443"
    volumes:
      - cs_config:/config
volumes:
  cs_config:

apps.name: n8n
apps.description: Workflow automation (like Zapier, self-hosted).
apps.why: Build little automations by drawing flowcharts: 'when I get a mail with an invoice, save it to Nextcloud and notify me'. No coding needed for most things.
apps.compose:
services:
  n8n:
    image: docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5678"
    volumes:
      - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
volumes:
  n8n_data:

apps.name: Dozzle
apps.description: Realtime log viewer for all your Docker containers.
apps.why: When something misbehaves, Dozzle shows you the live 'diary' of every app on your server in a clean web view. Helmsman shows logs too — Dozzle is the deluxe version.
apps.compose:
services:
  dozzle:
    image: amir20/dozzle:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro

apps.name: Home Assistant
apps.description: Open-source smart home hub: lights, sensors, automations, dashboards.
apps.why: Connects lamps, plugs, thermostats and sensors from almost every brand into one app — with automations like 'lights off when nobody is home'. All local, no cloud accounts.
apps.compose:
services:
  homeassistant:
    image: ghcr.io/home-assistant/home-assistant:stable
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8123"
    volumes:
      - ha_config:/config
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
volumes:
  ha_config:

apps.name: Paperless-ngx
apps.description: Scan, index and archive documents with OCR and full-text search.
apps.why: Photograph or scan your letters, invoices and contracts — Paperless reads the text, sorts them automatically and makes everything searchable. Your paper chaos becomes a searchable archive.
apps.compose:
services:
  broker:
    image: redis:7
    restart: unless-stopped
  paperless:
    image: ghcr.io/paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - broker
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8000"
    environment:
      PAPERLESS_REDIS: redis://broker:6379
    volumes:
      - pl_data:/usr/src/paperless/data
      - pl_media:/usr/src/paperless/media
      - pl_export:/usr/src/paperless/export
      - pl_consume:/usr/src/paperless/consume
volumes:
  pl_data:
  pl_media:
  pl_export:
  pl_consume:

apps.name: Syncthing
apps.description: Continuous peer-to-peer file synchronization between devices.
apps.why: Pick folders on your laptop, phone and server — Syncthing keeps them identical automatically, directly between your devices. Great for backups without any cloud.
apps.compose:
services:
  syncthing:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/syncthing:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8384"
      - "22000:22000/tcp"
      - "22000:22000/udp"
    volumes:
      - st_config:/config
      - st_data:/data
volumes:
  st_config:
  st_data:

apps.name: FreshRSS
apps.tagline: All your news in one quiet place
apps.description: Self-hosted RSS feed reader and aggregator.
apps.why: Follow news sites, blogs and YouTube channels in one clean timeline — no algorithm, no ads, no doomscrolling. Works with many nice phone apps.
apps.compose:
services:
  freshrss:
    image: freshrss/freshrss:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - fr_data:/var/www/FreshRSS/data
      - fr_ext:/var/www/FreshRSS/extensions
volumes:
  fr_data:
  fr_ext:

apps.name: Stirling PDF
apps.tagline: The Swiss army knife for PDFs
apps.description: Merge, split, compress, sign and convert PDFs in the browser.
apps.why: All those 'edit this PDF' websites — but private, on your own server: merge, split, compress, rotate, sign, convert to Word and 50 other tools. Nothing gets uploaded anywhere.
apps.compose:
services:
  stirling:
    image: stirlingtools/stirling-pdf:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - sp_data:/usr/share/tessdata
      - sp_configs:/configs
volumes:
  sp_data:
  sp_configs:

apps.name: Homepage
apps.tagline: A start page for your server
apps.description: Customizable dashboard with links and live widgets for all your services.
apps.why: One pretty browser start page with buttons to every app on your server, plus live info (downloads, disk space, weather). Set it as your browser homepage and everything is one click away.
apps.compose:
services:
  homepage:
    image: ghcr.io/gethomepage/homepage:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    environment:
      HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS: "*"
    volumes:
      - hp_config:/app/config
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
volumes:
  hp_config:

apps.name: Memos
apps.tagline: Quick notes, like a private Twitter
apps.description: Lightweight note-taking with markdown, tags and an API.
apps.why: Jot down thoughts, links and snippets in seconds — everything is saved on your server, searchable and taggable. Much lighter than a full wiki.
apps.compose:
services:
  memos:
    image: neosmemo/memos:stable
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5230"
    volumes:
      - memos_data:/var/opt/memos
volumes:
  memos_data:

apps.name: Immich
apps.description: Self-hosted photo & video backup with mobile apps, timeline, albums, facial recognition and search.
apps.why: Automatic phone photo backup like Google Photos or iCloud, but the pictures stay on YOUR server. Great mobile apps, machine-learning search ('show me beach photos'), shared albums.
apps.compose:
services:
  immich-server:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-server:release
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:2283"
    volumes:
      - immich_upload:/data
    environment:
      DB_HOSTNAME: immich-db
      DB_USERNAME: immich
      DB_PASSWORD: {{DB_PASSWORD}}
      DB_DATABASE_NAME: immich
      REDIS_HOSTNAME: immich-redis
    depends_on:
      - immich-db
      - immich-redis
  immich-machine-learning:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-machine-learning:release
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - immich_ml_cache:/cache
  immich-redis:
    image: valkey/valkey:8
    restart: unless-stopped
  immich-db:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/postgres:14-vectorchord0.4.3
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: immich
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: {{DB_PASSWORD}}
      POSTGRES_DB: immich
    volumes:
      - immich_db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
volumes:
  immich_upload:
  immich_ml_cache:
  immich_db:

apps.name: Audiobookshelf
apps.description: Stream your audiobooks and podcasts, keep listening progress in sync across devices.
apps.why: If you have audiobooks lying around, this turns them into your own Audible: progress sync, sleep timer, great phone apps.
apps.compose:
services:
  audiobookshelf:
    image: ghcr.io/advplyr/audiobookshelf:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - abs_audiobooks:/audiobooks
      - abs_podcasts:/podcasts
      - abs_config:/config
      - abs_metadata:/metadata
volumes:
  abs_audiobooks:
  abs_podcasts:
  abs_config:
  abs_metadata:

apps.name: Mealie
apps.description: Save recipes (imports them from almost any cooking website by URL), plan meals, generate shopping lists.
apps.why: Paste a recipe link, get a clean ad-free version forever. Weekly meal plans and shopping lists included — the family can use it too.
apps.compose:
services:
  mealie:
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:9000"
    volumes:
      - mealie_data:/app/data
    environment:
      ALLOW_SIGNUP: "false"
volumes:
  mealie_data:

apps.name: Vikunja
apps.description: Task management with lists, kanban, gantt, labels, sharing — a self-hosted Todoist/Trello.
apps.why: One place for personal and project to-dos, with boards like Trello, that isn't owned by a startup that might shut down.
apps.compose:
services:
  vikunja:
    image: vikunja/vikunja:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3456"
    environment:
      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_ENABLEREGISTRATION: "true"
    volumes:
      - vikunja_files:/app/vikunja/files
      - vikunja_db:/db
volumes:
  vikunja_files:
  vikunja_db:

apps.name: Actual Budget
apps.description: Envelope-style budgeting with bank import, fast and local-first. Your finances never leave your server.
apps.why: A genuinely good budgeting app (like YNAB) where your financial data stays 100% at home. Syncs across devices.
apps.compose:
services:
  actual:
    image: docker.io/actualbudget/actual-server:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5006"
    volumes:
      - actual_data:/data
volumes:
  actual_data:

apps.name: linkding
apps.description: Minimal, fast bookmark archive with tags, search, and browser extensions.
apps.why: Never lose a link again: save from any device, tag it, find it later — with an extension for every browser.
apps.compose:
services:
  linkding:
    image: sissbruecker/linkding:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:9090"
    environment:
      LD_SUPERUSER_NAME: admin
      LD_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD: {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}
    volumes:
      - linkding_data:/etc/linkding/data
volumes:
  linkding_data:

apps.name: Wallabag
apps.description: Save articles to read later — cleaned of ads and clutter, with apps and e-reader export.
apps.why: Since Pocket shut down, this is the way to keep a private reading list. Articles are stored readable forever, even if the site dies.
apps.compose:
services:
  wallabag:
    image: wallabag/wallabag:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    environment:
      SYMFONY__ENV__DOMAIN_NAME: http://localhost:{{PORT}}
    volumes:
      - wallabag_data:/var/www/wallabag/data
      - wallabag_images:/var/www/wallabag/web/assets/images
volumes:
  wallabag_data:
  wallabag_images:

apps.name: ntfy
apps.description: Send push notifications to your phone via simple HTTP calls — from scripts, cron jobs, or PocketADM itself.
apps.why: PocketADM's agent and background watchmen can push alerts to your phone through this — self-hosted, no Google account needed. One `curl` = one notification.
apps.compose:
services:
  ntfy:
    image: binwiederhier/ntfy:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: serve --cache-file /var/cache/ntfy/cache.db
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - ntfy_cache:/var/cache/ntfy
      - ntfy_config:/etc/ntfy
volumes:
  ntfy_cache:
  ntfy_config:

apps.name: WireGuard (wg-easy)
apps.tagline: Your own VPN, with a web UI
apps.description: WireGuard VPN server with a friendly web interface: add devices with QR codes, see who's connected.
apps.why: Reach your server and home network safely from anywhere WITHOUT exposing every app to the internet. Scan a QR code on your phone and you're in.

fields.label: Public address (domain or IP) of this server

apps.compose:
services:
  wg-easy:
    image: ghcr.io/wg-easy/wg-easy:14
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      WG_HOST: {{HOST}}
      PASSWORD: {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}
    ports:
      - "51820:51820/udp"
      - "{{PORT}}:51821"
    volumes:
      - wg_easy_data:/etc/wireguard
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
      - SYS_MODULE
    sysctls:
      - net.ipv4.conf.all.src_valid_mark=1
      - net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
volumes:
  wg_easy_data:

apps.name: Pi-hole
apps.description: DNS server that blocks ads and trackers for every device in your network — TVs and phones included.
apps.why: Set your router's DNS to this once, and ads/trackers disappear on everything in your wifi, even where ad-blockers can't be installed (smart TVs!).
apps.compose:
services:
  pihole:
    image: pihole/pihole:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "53:53/tcp"
      - "53:53/udp"
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    environment:
      TZ: Europe/Berlin
      FTLCONF_webserver_api_password: {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}
    volumes:
      - pihole_etc:/etc/pihole
volumes:
  pihole_etc:

apps.name: File Browser
apps.tagline: Web file manager for your server
apps.description: Browse, upload, download, rename and share files on the server through a clean web UI.
apps.why: Like a mini-Dropbox web view for any folder on your server — handy for quickly grabbing or dropping a file from your phone.
apps.compose:
services:
  filebrowser:
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - filebrowser_data:/srv
      - filebrowser_db:/database
volumes:
  filebrowser_data:
  filebrowser_db:

apps.name: changedetection.io
apps.description: Monitors web pages and notifies you when something changes — prices, stock, announcements, anything.
apps.why: 'Tell me when this product is back in stock / the price drops / this page changes' — without checking manually every day.
apps.compose:
services:
  changedetection:
    image: ghcr.io/dgtlmoon/changedetection.io:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5000"
    volumes:
      - changedetection_data:/datastore
volumes:
  changedetection_data:

apps.name: Kavita
apps.description: Library server for ebooks, comics and manga with a slick reader in the browser and progress sync.
apps.why: Your Kindle library, self-hosted: read EPUBs and comics on any device from your own collection, right where you left off.
apps.compose:
services:
  kavita:
    image: jvmilazz0/kavita:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5000"
    volumes:
      - kavita_books:/books
      - kavita_config:/kavita/config
volumes:
  kavita_books:
  kavita_config:

apps.name: Duplicati
apps.description: Scheduled, encrypted, incremental backups to S3, Backblaze, Google Drive, FTP, or another disk — with a web UI.
apps.why: The missing piece of most home servers: real off-site backups. Point it at your important folders and a cheap cloud bucket, sleep better.
apps.compose:
services:
  duplicati:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/duplicati:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8200"
    environment:
      PUID: "0"
      PGID: "0"
      TZ: Europe/Berlin
      SETTINGS_ENCRYPTION_KEY: pocketadm-settings-key
      DUPLICATI__WEBSERVICE_PASSWORD: {{UI_PASSWORD}}
    volumes:
      - duplicati_config:/config
      - /:/source:ro
volumes:
  duplicati_config:

apps.name: Netdata
apps.description: Real-time metrics for CPU, RAM, disks, network and every container — with zero configuration.
apps.why: When something feels slow, this shows you exactly what's happening on the machine right now, down to per-second detail.
apps.compose:
services:
  netdata:
    image: netdata/netdata:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:19999"
    cap_add:
      - SYS_PTRACE
    security_opt:
      - apparmor:unconfined
    volumes:
      - netdata_config:/etc/netdata
      - netdata_lib:/var/lib/netdata
      - /proc:/host/proc:ro
      - /sys:/host/sys:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
volumes:
  netdata_config:
  netdata_lib:

apps.name: Umami
apps.description: Google-Analytics alternative: simple, GDPR-friendly visitor stats for your websites, no cookies.
apps.why: If you run any website or blog: see visits without spying on people or cookie banners. One tiny script tag.
apps.compose:
services:
  umami:
    image: ghcr.io/umami-software/umami:postgresql-latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://umami:{{DB_PASSWORD}}@umami-db:5432/umami
      DATABASE_TYPE: postgresql
    depends_on:
      - umami-db
  umami-db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: umami
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: {{DB_PASSWORD}}
      POSTGRES_DB: umami
    volumes:
      - umami_db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
volumes:
  umami_db:

apps.name: BookStack
apps.description: Organized documentation platform (books → chapters → pages) with a WYSIWYG editor — great for household/server docs.
apps.why: Document your server setup, home network, appliance manuals, recipes — structured like books, searchable, with images.
apps.compose:
services:
  bookstack:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/bookstack:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    environment:
      PUID: "1000"
      PGID: "1000"
      APP_URL: http://localhost:{{PORT}}
      DB_HOST: bookstack-db
      DB_PORT: "3306"
      DB_USERNAME: bookstack
      DB_PASSWORD: {{DB_PASSWORD}}
      DB_DATABASE: bookstackapp
    volumes:
      - bookstack_config:/config
    depends_on:
      - bookstack-db
  bookstack-db:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/mariadb:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      PUID: "1000"
      PGID: "1000"
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: {{DB_PASSWORD}}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: bookstackapp
      MYSQL_USER: bookstack
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: {{DB_PASSWORD}}
    volumes:
      - bookstack_db:/config
volumes:
  bookstack_config:
  bookstack_db:

apps.name: Trilium Notes
apps.description: Power-user note taking: infinitely nested notes, scripting, encryption, day journal — syncs with desktop apps.
apps.why: For big personal knowledge bases (think Obsidian/Evernote power users) with the data on your own machine.
apps.compose:
services:
  trilium:
    image: triliumnext/trilium:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - trilium_data:/home/node/trilium-data
volumes:
  trilium_data:

apps.name: Open WebUI
apps.tagline: ChatGPT-style UI for local & cloud AI
apps.description: Full-featured AI chat interface: connect Ollama or API keys, chat history, documents (RAG), multi-user.
apps.why: A polished ChatGPT-like app for the whole household, running on your box — works beautifully with the local models PocketADM can set up under Local AI.
apps.compose:
services:
  open-webui:
    image: ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - open_webui_data:/app/backend/data
    extra_hosts:
      - host.docker.internal:host-gateway
volumes:
  open_webui_data:

apps.name: SearXNG
apps.description: Your own search page that queries Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo & co anonymously and merges the results.
apps.why: Search the web without being profiled: your queries go out anonymized from your server, results come back clean and ad-free.
apps.compose:
services:
  searxng:
    image: searxng/searxng:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - searxng_config:/etc/searxng
volumes:
  searxng_config:

apps.name: Jellyseerr
apps.description: Beautiful request portal for Jellyfin/Plex: family members wish for a movie, you see and approve requests.
apps.why: If you run Jellyfin for the family: everyone can browse and request titles in a Netflix-style UI instead of texting you.
apps.compose:
services:
  jellyseerr:
    image: fallenbagel/jellyseerr:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5055"
    environment:
      TZ: Europe/Berlin
    volumes:
      - jellyseerr_config:/app/config
volumes:
  jellyseerr_config:

apps.name: qBittorrent
apps.description: Full torrent client controlled from the browser — for Linux ISOs and other legal downloads.
apps.why: Queue big downloads on the server instead of your laptop: they finish while your devices sleep.
apps.compose:
services:
  qbittorrent:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/qbittorrent:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
      - "6881:6881"
      - "6881:6881/udp"
    environment:
      PUID: "1000"
      PGID: "1000"
      TZ: Europe/Berlin
      WEBUI_PORT: "8080"
    volumes:
      - qbittorrent_config:/config
      - qbittorrent_downloads:/downloads
volumes:
  qbittorrent_config:
  qbittorrent_downloads:

apps.name: Baïkal
apps.description: Lightweight CalDAV/CardDAV server — sync calendars and contacts across all devices without Google/Apple.
apps.why: Your appointments and address book, synced to phone and laptop via open standards. Set up once, works everywhere.
apps.compose:
services:
  baikal:
    image: ckulka/baikal:nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - baikal_config:/var/www/baikal/config
      - baikal_data:/var/www/baikal/Specific
volumes:
  baikal_config:
  baikal_data:

apps.name: Glances
apps.description: Lightweight all-in-one system overview: processes, sensors, disks, network, containers.
apps.why: A quick 'what is my server doing right now' page — lighter than Netdata, zero setup.
apps.compose:
services:
  glances:
    image: nicolargo/glances:latest-full
    restart: unless-stopped
    pid: host
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:61208"
    environment:
      GLANCES_OPT: "-w"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
